name: Fred Goslin's Chicken Breasts Parmesan
recipeInstructions:
1) Mix the tomato sauce, Italian seasoning, and garlic salt in a 2-cup measuring cup. Cover with waxed paper and microwave on high (100%) for 2 minutes. Stir, then reduce power to medium (50%) and microwave for 5 minutes, stirring once. Set aside.
2) Mix bread crumbs, 1/3 cup Parmesan cheese, and parsley flakes. Dip the chicken breasts in the beaten egg, then in the crumb mixture (repeat if desired). Place in a rectangular baking dish (12" x 18") or a 10" square casserole, cover with waxed paper, and microwave on medium-high (70%) until the chicken is tender, about 9 to 14 minutes. Do not turn over.
3) Pour sauce over the chicken, sprinkle mozzarella on top, and then sprinkle with additional Parmesan cheese if desired. Microwave on medium-high (70%) until the mozzarella melts and the sauce is hot, about 2 to 5 minutes.
